query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a couple kissing outdoors in front of a light-colored wall, with their large shadow cast beside them. The woman wears a dark dress and stands on one foot with her other leg bent behind her, while the man wears dark clothing and glasses. Sparse vegetation and grass are visible at the bottom of the frame, with a small bush on the left side.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A faded black and white photograph of a couple kissing outdoors, rendered in muted, low-vibrancy tones with a washed-out, retro quality. Their large silhouetted shadow is cast against a pale wall beside them. The woman wears a dark dress and balances on one foot with her other leg bent behind her, while the man in dark clothing and glasses embraces her. Sparse vegetation and grass appear at the bottom of the frame.
